# STRAT.008 ? Attachment Parenting

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** parenting_educational
**Domain:** PARENTING_EDUCATIONAL
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Secure attachment; responsive caregiving; physical closeness; attunement to needs; long-term relationship focus

## Application
Respond sensitively; maintain closeness; attune to child's signals; prioritize attachment security; long-term relationship over short-term compliance

## Key Values
- Secure attachment
- Responsiveness
- Attunement
- Physical closeness
- Relationship priority

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, parenting_educational

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
